title: atropis distans var. tenuis
intro: Atropis distans var. tenuis, also known as Japanese angelica tree or Chinese angelica, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Atropis distans var. tenuis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root for herbal use, with the dried root being the most commonly used part for medicinal purposes.
